name: Kingston Athletics Track (Kingsmeadow)
metaTitle: Kingston Athletics Track - Weir Archer | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and facility information for the Weir Archer Athletics Centre in Kingston.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Mon–Thu 08:00–22:00, Fri 08:00–20:00, Sat–Sun 09:00–16:30. Note: Restricted on Chelsea FC Women matchdays.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Access via pay-as-you-go sessions or memberships via Places Leisure. Contact the centre for current track rates.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: An 8-lane 400m track equipped with full field event facilities and a modern fitness suite.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Free on-site parking for centre users. Parking is extremely limited during home football matches at the adjacent stadium.

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official Places Leisure page for the Weir Archer Centre for track bookings.
